title: gymnema sylvestre var. affine
intro: Gymnema sylvestre var. affine is a perennial plant native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and aid in weight management. The plant's leaves contain compounds like gymnemic acid, which are believed to have a positive effect on insulin sensitivity and glucose metabolism, leading to various health benefits such as improved glycemic control and reduced body weight. Gymnema sylvestre var. affine is traditionally consumed in herbal preparations like teas, capsules, and extracts, which have been used to support diabetes management and overall well-being.
